basic_details.job_title: Keonjhar District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Keonjhar District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Notification 2026 has been released on 07 July 2026 on the official website keonjhar.dcourts.gov.in. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the Keonjhar District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age relaxation for reserved categories will be as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, Diploma in Computer Application, Odia language proficiency
qualification.details: Must be a citizen of India. Must have passed at least +3 examinations or such other qualification as are equivalent to +3 examination of a recognised University. Must have passed at least Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized institution. Be able to speak, read and write Odia and have passed a test in Odia equivalent to the M.E. standard. Be of good character. Be of sound health, good physique and free from organic defects or bodily infirmity. Shall not have more than one spouse living, if married. Have no Criminal antecedent on the date of application.

salary_details.details: Pay Matrix as per the ORSP Rules, 2017 Level-4 Rs. 19,900- 63,200/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Keonjhar District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Keonjhar District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.keonjhar_district_court: Graduate, Diploma in Computer Application, Odia language proficiency

content_sections.heading: Keonjhar District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Keonjhar District Court Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Keonjhar District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Keonjhar District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Vacancy 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Must be a citizen of India. Must have passed at least +3 examinations or such other qualification as are equivalent to +3 examination of a recognised University. Must have passed at least Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized institution. Be able to speak, read and write Odia and have passed a test in Odia equivalent to the M.E. standard. Be of good character. Be of sound health, good physique and free from organic defects or bodily infirmity. Shall not have more than one spouse living, if married. Have no Criminal antecedent on the date of application.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age relaxation for reserved categories will be as per rules.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Pay Matrix as per the ORSP Rules, 2017 Level-4 Rs. 19,900- 63,200/-

content_sections.heading: Keonjhar District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Applications

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Test (English, Arithmetic, General Knowledge, Computer Science (Practical)) Viva Voce

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Keonjhar District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Keonjhar District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Keonjhar District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form is 07 August 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed at least +3 examinations or equivalent, possess a Diploma in Computer Application, and be proficient in speaking, reading, and writing Odia.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist post is between 18 and 42 years as of 07 August 2026. Age relaxation will be provided to reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist post in the Keonjhar District Court.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will be placed in Pay Matrix Level-4, with a salary ranging from Rs. 19,900 to Rs. 63,200 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post or submit it in person.

faq.question: Q7. What are the stages in the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process will include a Written Test covering English, Arithmetic, General Knowledge, and Computer Science (Practical), followed by a Viva Voce.

faq.question: Q8. Where should I send the application form?
faq.answer: The application form should be sent to the office of the District Judge, Keonjhar, at the address: Registrar, Civil Courts, Keonjhar, At/PO: Keonjhargarh, Dist: Keonjhar, Pin: 758001.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates along with the application form.
